nodes.label: T01 Auth API
nodes.description: Ship the authentication API surface that establishes the guarded entry point for spawned work.

nodes.label: T02 Dashboard Shell
nodes.description: Build the dashboard shell that hosts orchestration state, task views, and system panels.

nodes.label: T03 DAG Monitor
nodes.description: Render and monitor live DAG execution so the active task, progress, and queue state stay visible.

nodes.label: T04 LLM Audit
nodes.description: Capture autonomous model actions, blocked writes, and policy violations for operator review.

nodes.label: T05 Security Layer
nodes.description: Enforce the orchestrator security layer that validates protected actions and hardened runtime behavior.

nodes.label: T06 Spawn Gate
nodes.description: Gate task dispatch so spawned agents only receive work through the approved queue and policy flow.

nodes.label: T07 Write Mutex
nodes.description: Add the repository write lock that serializes file mutation and blocks stray writes outside task scope.

nodes.label: T08 Vector Memory
nodes.description: Persist retrieval-ready execution memory so prior outcomes can be embedded and reused in planning.

nodes.label: T09 Model ETA
nodes.description: Project training milestones from current trace throughput and expose ETA signals to the dashboard.

nodes.label: T10 Trace Pipe
nodes.description: Pipe loop, task, and memory events into append-only traces for exports, steering, and replay.

nodes.label: T11 Training Pipeline
nodes.description: Turn captured traces into the model-training pipeline that exports datasets and powers iterative learning.
